front.title: Redirecting RDAP Queries to Holder-Designated Servers for Subordinate Resources

abstract.t: Registration Data Access Protocol (RDAP) queries can be resolved from the IANA bootstrap registries down to the most specific object held by a registry operator's RDAP service. Where the holder of a registered resource maintains registration data for resources subordinate to it, such as DNS names below a registered domain or more-specific networks below an address allocation, and operates a conformant RDAP service for that data, there is currently no discoverable referral from the registry's response to the holder's service. This document describes an optional, holder-designated referral for subordinate resources, building on the explicit redirect mechanism defined for RDAP. It is written as input to draft-ietf- regext-rdap-referrals and its content may be merged into that document.
